issue.message: Call requires API level 31 (current min is 29): `dynamicDarkColorScheme`
Call requires API level 31 (current min is 29): `dynamicLightColorScheme`
A newer version of Gradle than 9.3.1 is available: 9.4.1
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin.android than 2.3.10 is available: 2.3.20
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.compose than 2.3.10 is available: 2.3.20
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.parcelize than 2.3.10 is available: 2.3.20
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.serialization than 2.3.10 is available: 2.3.20
PathDataNode.nodesToPath can only be called from within the same library group prefix (referenced groupId=`androidx.core` with prefix androidx from groupId=`VibeApp`)

issue.errorLine1: <string name="platform_select_description">Choose the platform you want to use. You can change this later in settings. More platforms to be supported.</string>

<string name="token_input_description">Enter the API Key of the platform you selected. This app never collect these data. These keys and chat data will be only stored in your device, and will not be sent to other servers besides API endpoints.</string>

<string name="select_openai_model_description">Please select the OpenAI chat model. Even if the selected model is multimodal, the app currently supports text inputs only. May be supported later in the future.</string>
<string name="gpt_4o_description">The fastest and most affordable flagship model.</string>
<string name="gpt_4o_mini_description">Affordable and intelligent small model for fast, lightweight tasks</string>
<string name="gpt_4_description">Performs the best at solving abstract problems.</string>
<string name="select_anthropic_model_description">Please select the Anthropic chat model. We currently support the Claude 3 family of models with only text inputs.</string>
<string name="claude_3_opus_description">Excels at writing and complex tasks.</string>
<string name="select_google_model_description">Gemini is a family of generative AI models made by Google. Only text inputs are supported.</string>
<string name="gemini_1_5_pro_description">Optimized for reasoning tasks including code and text generation.</string>
<string name="gemini_1_5_flash_description">Fast and versatile performance across a diverse variety of tasks.</string>
<string name="gemini_1_0_pro_description">Natural language tasks, multi-turn text and code chat, and code generation.</string>

<string name="select_platform_description">Select platforms that you want to use in this chat. Once the chat is created, you can not change this settings. If you would like to change this, please create a new chat.</string>
<string name="enable_at_leat_one_platform">Please enable at least one platform to create a chat.</string>
<string name="system_prompt_description">A system prompt is a set of instructions, guidelines, and contextual information that\'s given to AI models before they interact with user queries.</string>

<string name="temperature_setting_description">Temperature is an amount of randomness injected into the response. Usually defaults to 1.0.\nSet low temperature for more focused and deterministic answers, and high for random answers.</string>

<string name="top_p_setting_description">In nucleus sampling, we compute the cumulative distribution over all the options for each subsequent token in decreasing probability order and cut it off once it reaches a particular probability specified by this value.\nMost models usually recommend altering this or temperature but not both.</string>
<string name="feedback_description">We are open to all kinds of feedback!</string>

<string name="select_ollama_model_description">Please select the Ollama model. Since there is so many models and tags that are supported, you can customize the model value. Make sure that the endpoint actually supports the model and get it running. Otherwise, it will not generate a response.</string>
<string name="custom_description">Use model that is not on the list.</string>
<string name="custom_model_warning">Note that the model name should be supported by the api.</string>

<string name="api_address_description">Please enter the address of your Ollama API including the port number. The app will be using v1/chat/completions endpoint, so please enter only the front part of the full address. The address must end with a \'/\'. e.g) http://192.168.1.100:11434/</string>
<string name="api_url_cautions">The url must end with a \'/\'.</string>
<string name="llama_3_2_description">Latest Lightweight Open Source language model from Meta.</string>
<string name="llama_3_1_description">State-of-the-art multilingual open source large language model from Meta.</string>
<string name="gemma2_description">Small Language Model released by Google.</string>

<string name="select_groq_model_description">Please select the Groq chat model. If you want models that are not on the list, check out Groq API documentation website and see what\'s available.</string>
<string name="groq_description">Fast AI inference for openly-available models.</string>
<string name="chat_models_description">Set model identifiers for each provider in this chat only.</string>
<string name="chat_title_dialog_description">AI generated title is only available with AICore supported devices.</string>

<string name="token_input_warning">NOTE: OpenAI and Anthropic uses prepaid billing, so you MUST CHARGE CREDITS in each accounts before you use them. Otherwise, the response will return an error.</string>

<string name="migration_description">The migration assistant will guide you to smoothly migrate to the upgraded database and data structures for the renewed version. Please follow the steps below.</string>
<string name="platform_name_supporting">Give your platform a memorable name</string>
<string name="api_key_supporting">Your API key is stored locally</string>
<string name="model_supporting">Enter the model identifier exactly as specified by the API</string>
<string name="delete_platform_confirmation">Are you sure you want to delete this platform? This action cannot be undone.</string>
<string name="extended_thinking_description">Enable for reasoning models (o1, o3, Claude with thinking, Gemini thinking)</string>
<string name="add_your_first_platform">Add your first AI platform to get started</string>
<string name="choose_platform_type_description">Select the AI provider you want to add</string>
<string name="platform_basics_description">Give your platform a name and verify the API URL</string>
<string name="api_key_description">Enter your API key. This is stored locally on your device.</string>
<string name="api_key_optional_note">API key is optional for local providers like Ollama</string>
<string name="model_description">Enter the model identifier you want to use</string>
<string name="openrouter_description">Access multiple AI models through one API</string>
<string name="at_least_one_platform_required">Add at least one platform to continue</string>

issue.message: The resource string "openai" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "tr" (Turkish) here
The resource string "anthropic" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "tr" (Turkish) here
The resource string "google" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "tr" (Turkish) here

The resource string "llama_3_1_70b_versatile" is marked as translatable="false", but is translated to "tr" (Turkish) here

Formatting %d followed by words ("selected"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("chats"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("selected"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("projects"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string

issue.message: The resource `R.string.project_initializing` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.no_projects_yet` appears to be unused
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `Canvas.withScale` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `Canvas.withTranslation` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toColorInt` instead?
